tests.test_body:
target datalayout = "p:8:8:8"

; Function Attrs: mustprogress
define void @zext_of_i1_stride(i1 %g, ptr %dst) #0 {
entry:
  %g.16 = zext i1 %g to i16
  %g.64 = zext i1 %g to i64
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %loop, %entry
  %iv = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %loop ]
  %gep = getelementptr inbounds i16, ptr %dst, i64 %iv
  store i16 %g.16, ptr %gep, align 2
  %iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %iv, %g.64
  %cmp = icmp ult i64 %iv.next, 16
  br i1 %cmp, label %loop, label %exit

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop
  ret void
}

attributes #0 = { mustprogress }

issue.title: [LoopVectorize] Sign-extension miscompile
issue.author: patrick-rivos

history.commit_subject: [VPlan] Also propagate versioned strides to users via sext/zext.
history.commit_message:
[VPlan] Also propagate versioned strides to users via sext/zext.

The versioned value may not be used in the loop directly but through a
sext/zext. Add new live-ins in those cases.

tests.test_body:
target datalayout = "e-m:e-i64:64-i128:128-n32:64-S128"

define void @unknown_inner_stride(ptr nocapture noundef %dst, ptr nocapture noundef readonly %src, i32 noundef %stride1, i32 noundef %stride2, i32 noundef %m, i32 noundef %n) {
entry:
  %cmp26 = icmp sgt i32 %m, 0
  %cmp224 = icmp sgt i32 %n, 0
  %or.cond = and i1 %cmp26, %cmp224
  br i1 %or.cond, label %outer.loop.preheader, label %exit

outer.loop.preheader:                             ; preds = %entry
  %add6 = add nuw nsw i32 %n, 1
  %0 = sext i32 %stride2 to i64
  %1 = sext i32 %stride1 to i64
  %2 = zext i32 %n to i64
  %3 = zext i32 %add6 to i64
  %wide.trip.count39 = zext i32 %m to i64
  %wide.trip.count = zext i32 %n to i64
  br label %outer.loop

outer.loop:                                       ; preds = %inner.loop.exit, %outer.loop.preheader
  %outer.iv = phi i64 [ 0, %outer.loop.preheader ], [ %outer.iv.next, %inner.loop.exit ]
  %4 = mul nsw i64 %outer.iv, %2
  %5 = mul nsw i64 %outer.iv, %3
  br label %inner.loop

inner.loop:                                       ; preds = %inner.loop, %outer.loop
  %inner.iv = phi i64 [ 0, %outer.loop ], [ %inner.iv.next, %inner.loop ]
  %6 = mul nsw i64 %inner.iv, %0
  %7 = add nsw i64 %6, %4
  %arrayidx.us = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %src, i64 %7
  %8 = load i32, ptr %arrayidx.us, align 4
  %9 = mul nsw i64 %inner.iv, %1
  %10 = add nsw i64 %9, %5
  %arrayidx11.us = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %dst, i64 %10
  %11 = load i32, ptr %arrayidx11.us, align 4
  %add12.us = add nsw i32 %11, %8
  store i32 %add12.us, ptr %arrayidx11.us, align 4
  %inner.iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %inner.iv, 1
  %exitcond.not = icmp eq i64 %inner.iv.next, %wide.trip.count
  br i1 %exitcond.not, label %inner.loop.exit, label %inner.loop

inner.loop.exit:                                  ; preds = %inner.loop
  %outer.iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %outer.iv, 1
  %exitcond40.not = icmp eq i64 %outer.iv.next, %wide.trip.count39
  br i1 %exitcond40.not, label %exit, label %outer.loop

exit:                                             ; preds = %inner.loop.exit, %entry
  ret void
}

target datalayout = "e-m:o-p270:32:32-p271:32:32-p272:64:64-i64:64-i128:128-f80:128-n8:16:32:64-S128"

declare i1 @cond()

define void @test_versioned_with_different_uses(i32 %offset, ptr noalias %dst.1, ptr %dst.2) {
entry:
  %offset.ext = zext i32 %offset to i64
  br label %outer.header

outer.header:                                     ; preds = %inner.loop, %entry
  %iv.1 = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.2.next, %inner.loop ]
  %c = call i1 @cond()
  br i1 %c, label %inner.loop, label %exit

inner.loop:                                       ; preds = %inner.loop, %outer.header
  %iv.2 = phi i64 [ %iv.1, %outer.header ], [ %iv.2.next, %inner.loop ]
  %iv.3 = phi i32 [ 0, %outer.header ], [ %iv.3.next, %inner.loop ]
  %iv.mul = mul i32 %iv.3, %offset
  %gep.mul = getelementptr i8, ptr %dst.1, i32 %iv.mul
  store i32 0, ptr %gep.mul, align 8
  %gep = getelementptr i32, ptr %dst.2, i64 %iv.2
  store i32 0, ptr %gep, align 8
  %iv.2.next = add i64 %iv.2, %offset.ext
  %iv.3.next = add i32 %iv.3, 1
  %ec = icmp eq i32 %iv.3, 200
  br i1 %ec, label %outer.header, label %inner.loop

exit:                                             ; preds = %outer.header
  ret void
}

target datalayout = "e-m:o-p270:32:32-p271:32:32-p272:64:64-i64:64-i128:128-f80:128-n8:16:32:64-S128"

define void @test_versioned_with_sext_use(i32 %offset, ptr %dst) {
entry:
  %offset.ext = sext i32 %offset to i64
  br label %outer.header

outer.header:                                     ; preds = %inner.loop, %entry
  %iv.1 = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.2.next, %inner.loop ]
  %c = call i1 @cond()
  br i1 %c, label %inner.loop, label %exit

inner.loop:                                       ; preds = %inner.loop, %outer.header
  %iv.2 = phi i64 [ %iv.1, %outer.header ], [ %iv.2.next, %inner.loop ]
  %iv.3 = phi i32 [ 0, %outer.header ], [ %iv.3.next, %inner.loop ]
  %gep = getelementptr i32, ptr %dst, i64 %iv.2
  store i32 0, ptr %gep, align 8
  %iv.2.next = add i64 %iv.2, %offset.ext
  %iv.3.next = add i32 %iv.3, 1
  %ec = icmp eq i32 %iv.3, 200
  br i1 %ec, label %outer.header, label %inner.loop

exit:                                             ; preds = %outer.header
  ret void
}

declare i1 @cond()

target datalayout = "e-m:o-p270:32:32-p271:32:32-p272:64:64-i64:64-i128:128-f80:128-n8:16:32:64-S128"

define void @versioned_sext_use_in_gep(i32 %scale, ptr %dst, i64 %scale.2) {
entry:
  %scale.ext = sext i32 %scale to i64
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %loop, %entry
  %iv = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %loop ]
  %iv.mul = mul i64 %iv, %scale.ext
  %gep.1 = getelementptr i8, ptr %dst, i64 %iv.mul
  %iv.next = add i64 %iv, 1
  %scale.mul = mul i64 %scale.ext, %scale.2
  %gep.2 = getelementptr i8, ptr %dst, i64 %scale.mul
  store ptr %gep.2, ptr %gep.1, align 8
  %ec = icmp eq i64 %iv.next, 256
  br i1 %ec, label %exit, label %loop

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop
  ret void
}

target datalayout = "e-m:o-p270:32:32-p271:32:32-p272:64:64-i64:64-i128:128-f80:128-n8:16:32:64-S128"

define void @test_versioned_with_non_ex_use(i32 %offset, ptr noalias %dst.1, ptr %dst.2) {
entry:
  %offset.ext = zext i32 %offset to i64
  %add = add i32 %offset, 3
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %loop, %entry
  %iv.2 = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.2.next, %loop ]
  %iv.3 = phi i32 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.3.next, %loop ]
  %iv.mul = mul i32 %iv.3, %add
  %gep.mul = getelementptr i8, ptr %dst.1, i32 %iv.mul
  store i32 0, ptr %gep.mul, align 8
  %iv.2.mul = mul i64 %iv.2, %offset.ext
  %gep = getelementptr i32, ptr %dst.2, i64 %iv.2.mul
  store i32 0, ptr %gep, align 8
  %iv.2.next = add i64 %iv.2, 1
  %iv.3.next = add i32 %iv.3, 1
  %ec = icmp eq i32 %iv.3, 200
  br i1 %ec, label %exit, label %loop

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop
  ret void
}

target datalayout = "e-m:o-p270:32:32-p271:32:32-p272:64:64-i64:64-i128:128-f80:128-n8:16:32:64-S128"

define void @test_versioned_with_zext_use(i32 %offset, ptr %dst) {
entry:
  %offset.ext = zext i32 %offset to i64
  br label %outer.header

outer.header:                                     ; preds = %inner.loop, %entry
  %iv.1 = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.2.next, %inner.loop ]
  %c = call i1 @cond()
  br i1 %c, label %inner.loop, label %exit

inner.loop:                                       ; preds = %inner.loop, %outer.header
  %iv.2 = phi i64 [ %iv.1, %outer.header ], [ %iv.2.next, %inner.loop ]
  %iv.3 = phi i32 [ 0, %outer.header ], [ %iv.3.next, %inner.loop ]
  %gep = getelementptr i32, ptr %dst, i64 %iv.2
  store i32 0, ptr %gep, align 8
  %iv.2.next = add i64 %iv.2, %offset.ext
  %iv.3.next = add i32 %iv.3, 1
  %ec = icmp eq i32 %iv.3, 200
  br i1 %ec, label %outer.header, label %inner.loop

exit:                                             ; preds = %outer.header
  ret void
}
